item.title: Version 2.4
item.description:
cyberWriter 2.4

Apple Intelligence

  • On-device AI that works out of the box — no API keys, no setup
  • Automatically available on supported hardware (macOS 26+)
  • Falls back gracefully when no cloud model is configured

Presentation Mode

  • Play your document as slides or flashcards
  • Splits by --- dividers or ## headings
  • Auto-play, shuffle, three layout modes (Standard / Wide / Card)
  • Keyboard controls: arrows, Space, R, W, F, Esc
  • Auto-generated title slide from YAML frontmatter
  • Mermaid diagrams and KaTeX math render on slides
  • "Format with AI" sends your doc to the AI for restructuring

PDF Export

  • Page range export — single pages, ranges, or comma-separated lists
  • Video placeholder cards in PDF (no more black rectangles)

Fixes

  • Sidebar state now correctly inherited by new windows/tabs
  • Sparkle auto-checks for updates daily

item.title: Version 2.3
item.description:
cyberWriter 2.3

Voice Recording & Transcription

  • Record voice notes to your vault
  • Record & transcribe with on-device speech recognition
  • Live dictation — speak and text appears in real time

Media Embeds

  • Embed audio, video, PDF, CSV, RTF, and text files with ![[file]]
  • YouTube links auto-embed as click-to-browser cards
  • All media encodes into portable HTML exports

Editor

  • Quick formatting toolbar — Bold, Italic, Code, Link, Highlight
  • Callout block dropdown (11 types)
  • Superscript and subscript commands
  • Custom templates — save any document as reusable template

Polish

  • Full HTML hover previews for wikilinks
  • Improved scroll sync with mermaid-heavy documents
  • Vault folder expansion state persists across sessions
  • Unsaved file indicator in vault sidebar

item.title: Version 2.2
item.description:
cyberWriter 2.2

  • Resizable sidebar panel (260–500pt, per-window)
  • Recent Files section in vault sidebar
  • Save to Vault and Create Vault commands
  • Sidebar state relay — new windows inherit panel layout
  • Redesigned Files tab toolbar
  • DMG distribution with Retina background

item.title: Version 2.1
item.description:
cyberWriter 2.1

  • Command Palette (⌘/) — search and execute 80+ commands
  • Template picker for new documents
  • Full-text vault search with content snippets
  • Improved mermaid chart theming
  • AI system prompt improvements for better mermaid syntax
  • Safari-compatible Open in Browser
